endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/mfaEnrollment:finalize
endpoints.description: Finishes enrolling a second factor for the user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/mfaEnrollment:start
endpoints.description: Step one of the MFA enrollment process. In SMS case, this sends an SMS verification code to the user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/mfaEnrollment:withdraw
endpoints.description: Revokes one second factor from the enrolled second factors for an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/mfaSignIn:finalize
endpoints.description: Verifies the MFA challenge and performs sign-in
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/mfaSignIn:start
endpoints.description: Sends the MFA challenge
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/passkeyEnrollment:finalize
endpoints.description: Finishes enrolling a passkey credential for the user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/passkeyEnrollment:start
endpoints.description: Step one of the passkey enrollment process. Returns a challenge and parameters for creation of the passkey credential.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/passkeySignIn:finalize
endpoints.description: Verifies the passkey assertion and signs the user in.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts/passkeySignIn:start
endpoints.description: Creates and returns the passkey challenge
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/accounts:revokeToken
endpoints.description: Revokes a user's token from an Identity Provider (IdP). This is done by manually providing an IdP credential, and the token types for revocation. An [API key](https://cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/api-keys) is required in the request in order to identify the Google Cloud project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/defaultSupportedIdps
endpoints.description: List all default supported Idps.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/recaptchaConfig
endpoints.description: Gets parameters needed for reCAPTCHA analysis.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Retrieve an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Delete an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Update an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/defaultSupportedIdpConfigs
endpoints.description: List all default supported Idp configurations for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/defaultSupportedIdpConfigs
endpoints.description: Create a default supported Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/inboundSamlConfigs
endpoints.description: List all inbound SAML configurations for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/inboundSamlConfigs
endpoints.description: Create an inbound SAML configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/oauthIdpConfigs
endpoints.description: List all Oidc Idp configurations for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/oauthIdpConfigs
endpoints.description: Create an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/tenants
endpoints.description: List tenants under the given agent project. Requires read permission on the Agent project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/tenants
endpoints.description: Create a tenant. Requires write permission on the Agent project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{project}/identityPlatform:initializeAuth
endpoints.description: Initialize Identity Platform for a Cloud project. Identity Platform is an end-to-end authentication system for third-party users to access your apps and services. These could include mobile/web apps, games, APIs and beyond. This is the publicly available variant of EnableIdentityPlatform that is only available to billing-enabled projects.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{resource}:getIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. An error is returned if the resource does not exist. An empty policy is returned if the resource exists but does not have a policy set on it. Caller must have the right Google IAM permission on the resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{resource}:setIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Sets the access control policy for a resource. If the policy exists, it is replaced. Caller must have the right Google IAM permission on the resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{resource}:testIamPermissions
endpoints.description: Returns the caller's permissions on a resource. An error is returned if the resource does not exist. A caller is not required to have Google IAM permission to make this request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.
